One Link
Get One Link
Privacy

We collect nothing.

No email. No phone number. No name. No analytics. No cookies. No tracking pixels. No fingerprinting. No third-party scripts. The Cloudflare Worker that serves this page does not log who visited or what they downloaded. The relays do not log anything about the people using the network.

If a government asked us tomorrow who downloaded One Link or who paired with whom, the honest answer is "we do not know and there is no way to find out." That is by design. The architecture is the policy.

For the avoidance of doubt:

  • We do not run a database of users because there are no users.
  • We do not have an account system to leak.
  • We do not have an advertising business.
  • We do not sell anything, so we do not have buyer data.
  • We do not transfer your data because there is no data to transfer.

Last updated 2026-05-16. See the full security model.
